ai_coach.headline: Zero data logged today -- nutrition, weight, and gym adherence are all unverifiable, so tomorrow starts with a clean logging reset.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: No telemetry (sleep, HRV, RHR, body battery) came through today, so recovery state is unknown rather than confirmed good or bad. Treat tomorrow as a standard rest/Zone 2 day per plan until data resumes.
action_plan: Log tonight's weight first thing tomorrow morning to restore the glide-path comparison.
Sync sleep and HRV data before tomorrow's training call is made.
Log any meals eaten today retroactively if possible so the 2300 kcal / 215g protein target can be checked against actual intake.
Confirm tomorrow's gym session in Hevy in advance -- 0/4 scheduled days are logged this week, so adherence needs to restart tomorrow.
If Zone 2 cardio happens tomorrow, keep effort conversational and log it immediately post-session.
ai_coach.nutrition_directive: Today's Rest/Zone 2 target was 2300 kcal, 215g protein, 200g carbs, 66g fat, but nothing was logged -- tomorrow, log meals in real time so protein (215g) and calories can actually be checked against the target instead of guessed at.
ai_coach.weight_trend_note: No weight was logged today and no glide-path history exists yet, so trend vs. the 83kg target milestone cannot be assessed -- get a weigh-in logged tomorrow to re-anchor the comparison.
risk_flags: Zero logging today across nutrition, weight, sleep, and training -- adherence tracking is currently blind.
Gym adherence sits at 0/4 scheduled days this week; if this continues into tomorrow it becomes a genuine volume-loss risk.

overview.summary: Every core metric -- weight, RHR, HRV, sleep, steps, body battery -- is missing today, making it impossible to synthesize an overall readiness picture.
overview.suggestion: Sync the wearable and log body weight before tomorrow's plan is generated so the overview isn't blank again.

plan.summary: With no weight history or glide-path entries recorded, progress toward the 83kg target and the wk8/wk16/wk24 milestones can't be evaluated today.
plan.suggestion: Weigh in tomorrow morning under consistent conditions and log it immediately so the glide-path line has a data point to compare against.

training.summary: Today was a designated Rest/Zone 2 day, but with no readiness or load data logged, there's no basis to judge how the body actually handled it.
training.suggestion: Treat tomorrow as scheduled (rest or conversational Zone 2 per plan) and log RHR/HRV/steps so tomorrow evening's readiness call is grounded in real numbers.

gym.summary: No gym session data exists for today or this week, leaving adherence at 0 of 4 scheduled days with no record of loads, reps, or PRs.
gym.suggestion: Get tomorrow's scheduled lift logged in Hevy immediately post-session, prioritizing the working weight on the main compound lift over any extra volume.

sleep.summary: Last night's sleep has no logged hours, stress, or body-battery data, so quality and recovery trend are unknown.
sleep.suggestion: Sync sleep tracking tonight so tomorrow's recovery read isn't another blank entry.

nutrition.summary: Today's target was 2300 kcal / 215g protein / 200g carbs / 66g fat, but 0 kcal and 0g of everything were logged, so adherence to the rest-day matrix cannot be confirmed.
nutrition.suggestion: Start tomorrow's Zone 2/rest-day eating with protein logged at each meal in real time to hit the 215g target instead of reconstructing it after the fact.
